log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:12+-2=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Hadozee — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:19+9=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 27 damage. Hadozee — Bardic Musician HP: 40/67
--- Hadozee — Bardic Musician --- HP: 40/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Hadozee — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 34 damage. Hadozee — Bardic Musician HP: 6/67
--- Hadozee — Bardic Musician --- HP: 6/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (6/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Hadozee — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Hadozee — Bardic Musician.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Hadozee — Bardic Musician.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Hadozee — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:9+9=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 28 damage. Hadozee — Bardic Musician HP: -22/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Hadozee — Bardic Musician.
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
